nasb.text: Meanwhile, the man was gazing at her in silence, to know whether the Lord had made his journey successful or not.

esv.text: The man gazed at her in silence to learn whether the Lord had prospered his journey or not.

cnv.text: 那人一句話也不說，只注視著她，要知道耶和華使他的道路亨通不亨通。

ccb.text: 当时，老总管在一旁静静地注视着利百加，要看看耶和华是否使他此行顺利。

csbs.text: 那人定睛看着她，默不作声，想知道耶和华是否使他此行顺利。
